messages.message: Dear France, I'm so glad we're neighbors! I'm looking to secure my position in the Mediterranean and would love to discuss how we can support each other against the Austrians and Turks. What are your plans for Spring? I'm certain we can find common ground!

Hey Italy! You know what they say about Italy/austria: if one of us dies, the other gets screwed over real quick. I'd love to find a way to help one another out this game. If you have any thoughts on openings or strategies, please let me know!

Austria, I must say your position is quite formidable, but I'm here to assure you I have no designs on your centers. Perhaps we could reach a friendly understanding about TRI and VEN? I'd hate for there to be any unnecessary conflict.
Hi France! We should definitely talk this game since our paths for growth often intersect! I'd be down to work with you in the long run. What would you like to do with burgundy this turn?
Hey Germany! I'd like to discuss how you think we can help one another this game. An alliance between the central powers can be quite strong as long as we stay tight. What do you think?
Hey Russia, how are you doing? Just wanted to establish comms. I was thinking it might be a good idea to go for a Juggernaut, what do you reckon?
Hi Austria! Definitely agreed, central powers have to stick together! I'll keep you posted on the west and would be happy to let you know if Russia is coming for you.
Hello England! I'm hoping we can keep some kind of an amicable alliance this game. Thoughts?
Hi Italy! We central powers have to stick together. I'll let you know if I hear any rumblings about you from the east.
Hello Turkey! Our paths for growth don't often cross, but we should definitely keep in touch! I haven't heard much from anyone, but I'll let you know if I hear anything coming your way.

Turkey, I admire your strength in the East, and I'm keen to avoid any rivalry with you. I'm focused on consolidating Italy's position and would be delighted to discuss peaceful relations in the region. What are your plans for Spring?
Hello Russia! I'm hoping we can agree to a non aggression pact. Thoughts?
Awesome, yeah our paths don't usually cross but its always good to keep a comms open!

Austria, I couldn't agree more — we truly are bound by geography and shared interests! I believe a mutual non-aggression pact focused on TRI and VEN would serve us both well. Perhaps we could support each other’s units in Spring to avoid conflict and ensure stability on our border? I’m thinking we could coordinate our movements — let me know what you think!

Hey Italy! So I think we can both agree that our nations benefit from peace, so I hope we can start off our cooperation by Dmzing Piedmont! That way, we don't have to worry about our backs and we can focus in more productive directions :)
Do you think we can DMZ Gol, Wes Med, Tyrr, and Pie?
I'm not sure what my spring plans are yet. Do you have any idea how the east is shaping up?
Thanks for your kind words, not sure what my plans are for Spring just yet but I'm all for working together
Sounds good!
I'm on board with that plan. Do you want to bounce? Or would you rather move out of Ven?
Hey Turkey, you have a similar thinking to myself. Would you like to DMZ Black Sea in order to get the ball rolling?
That'd be great, thank you!

Germany, thank you for your kind words and support. I appreciate the central powers standing together. I'm currently focused on securing southern Europe and the Mediterranean — if there's anything I can do to support your ambitions or shield you from eastern threats, please let me know!
How are your relations with Austria?

Hey Germany! I'm happy to work with you in the long term as well!

I've seen many successful German-french alliances and I think it'd be great to try and make one this game. I'm not sure if I can trust you to DMZ Burgundy, as that's a little too risky for me. I've done it before, though, and it ended up working out for both of us :) I'd love to work with you to the endgame though.

How are you thinking of opening? I personally would love to see a Sea Lion alliance.
Yeah sounds good to me

France, I received your message and couldn’t agree more — we're both at the mercy of the Austrians and Turks if they choose to act aggressively. I'm considering holding my army in VEN to support our mutual interests in the south. How about we support each other’s moves this Spring to keep pressure off both of us?
Hey Austria, how are you? Just establishing comms.
Hi Germany, good luck this game! I think England and Germany working together is a natural fit. Would you be interested in tackling France together?
Hey Turkey! I'm doing well, how about you?
Hey Germany! We're both better served going our own separate ways, I'll respect your borders, what do you say?
Good thanks! What are you thinking for the opening? I haven't heard much from Russia.
I have tentative orders in for a bounce. Let me know if you'd like to do something different
Looks like Austria is out, we should make quick work of him
I have yet to hear from Russia either. I'll let you know what I'm thinking once I do!
I could definitely see that happening, what do you have in mind?
Excellent
Hey Russia! How's it going?

Austria, I appreciate your flexibility! A bounce sounds agreeable — I'll hold my army in VEN while yours stays in TRI. That way, we both preserve our strength and keep our border stable. Thank you for the cooperation!
Sounds perfect to me!
Hey England, I feel like we'd both be better off with a peaceful north. What do you say we split Norway and Sweden and head down separate paths?
He has messaged me now
Hey Italy! I wanted to reach out to see if you'd be willing to consider splitting up Austria with me.

Turkey, my relations with Austria are peaceful and cooperative — we've reached an understanding to avoid conflict along our border. I'm focused on consolidation, not confrontation, and I hope we can maintain mutual respect in the region.
(You open to Den, Bal, and Kie)

Russia, I'm flattered by your offer — I admire your strength and ambition in the north. However, my focus remains on securing Italy’s position and maintaining stability along my borders with Austria and Turkey. I believe the Central Powers must remain unified, and I'd hate to see Austria fall apart without considering the consequences. Perhaps there's a way we can keep pressure on Austria together — let me know your thoughts!

Hey Italy! I'm happy to respect your wishes for stability, however I will say this: the majority of Austrian centers lie within the home centers of our Central Powers allies (Germany and Italy). The people of Russia will not stand for such transgressions against their own country. The people of Italy will remain unaffected, with the exception of your northern border.

In addition to this, I will tell you that I have a few things to offer you in exchange for your help against Austria. Once Austria is dealt with I will gladly help you take a majority of Turkey's centers. The Balkan countries I hope you find appealing
He has not to me
Great thanks
Awesome. Keep in touch, I'll see if I hear anything!
Weird
Great!

Russia, I appreciate your keen awareness of the Central Powers’ interests — and your vision for Austria is certainly bold. However, Italy must tread carefully on the northern border, and I’m not sure aggression toward Austria would serve us both. That said, I’m always open to cooperation in the region. If you’re serious about shared goals, I’d love to hear your plans for Spring — perhaps we can find a way to support each other without risking unnecessary conflict.
Hey Austria, I've got a proposition for you.
Sure, I can stay out of burgundy and take it with my army in Munich.
Hey Russia, I couldn't agree more. Splitting Scandinavia is the perfect way to avoid confrontation and maximize growth
Just got a very short message from him. How are your relations with him?
Hey England, how are you? Just establishing comms!
What's that?
How are your relations with Russia?

Hey England! So I think we can both agree that our nations benefit from peace, so I hope we can start off our cooperation by Dmzing the English Channel!

I've seen many successful English-french alliances and I think it'd be great to try and make one this game. I'd love to work with you to the endgame though. How are you thinking of opening? I personally would love to see a strong English opening to Scandinavia.

I'll let you know what I hear from the east, too. Do you know anything about the east?
They are quite good, we've agreed to dmz the black sea.
I completely agree with you regarding the northern border. For the sake of our mutual trust, we should keep Tyrolia as a DMZ.
Hey France, how's it going?
Well, you get Belgium and I get Paris
Glad we're in agreement! Best of luck

Hi France, good luck this game! I completely agree that the English Channel serves as a great barrier to war between our nations. I will respect that boundary if you will. I'd like to see a long-term alliance with you as well.

Not yet, I've only gotten the usual messages from Russia about Scandinavia
In exchange for your help against Turkey, I'll give you Greece, Serbia, and Bulgaria.

Russia, your wisdom on the northern border is truly appreciated — a DMZ in Tyrolia is a wise and pragmatic choice. I admire your strategic patience and your eye for long-term stability. While Italy remains focused on securing southern Europe, I’m always open to a shared vision for the future. If there’s a way we can support each other’s goals indirectly — perhaps through Austria or even the Balkans — I’d be delighted to explore it.
Ok.
Ditto, friend
Hey Turkey, I wanted to run something by you.
Hello Turkey, good luck this game!
Good! What about you? Do you think you'll open north or south?
Indeed, there are several paths we could take in the future. I'll take the Northern path and you take the Southern path?
Hey Russia, what's up?
You too!
Have you heard anything from Russia?

I'm happy to make a long term alliance with you! As I said, it would be great to start with a DMZ in the English Channel. I'd love to talk about a long-term alliance with you after that!

I haven't heard much from Russia, either, but they have messaged me. They've said they want to focus on the south.
The south is a bit quiet right now. I've got a non-aggression agreement with Germany and Italy, I just need to make sure I can build at the end of this turn. Do you have any hot tips?
Hey Turkey, Italy and Germany are in alliance and I'm getting an awful lot of pressure from Italy in particular.
How about you?
From Austria as well, he wants me to stab you. Have you spoken to Austria? I think it would be smart if we could get him to attack Italy and then we can close in from the east.
Oh! I love that idea!
I'd prefer to get a good solid ally before we stab Austria. The only people we could work with are each other, so it would make the most sense.
Hmm. Okay. He just offered me Greece, Serbia, and Bulgaria if I help him into Bulgaria next turn.
I'll happily take Greece and Bulgaria and then let you have Serbia and Rumania.
We can split the Balkans and go for Russia together?
Sounds great!
If you're talking about moving your army in Venice to Piedmont, then I won't be comfortable supporting you into Munich in the fall. I can agree to a DMZ in Piedmont though.
Yeah absolutely
I don't think Italy is going to attack you, but I don't really have much to offer you...
Great, how would you like to start?
Well we can wait a turn and see what he does
Fair enough. Let me know if you need anything, I'll do the same.
Sounds good
I'll take them and then help you into Bulgaria?
Sure thing.
What are you planning for the opening?

Russia, your suggestion of dividing the map is incredibly wise — Northern path for you, Southern path for me — a masterstroke! It allows us both to grow without stepping on each other’s toes, and I admire your vision. I’ll be focusing on stabilizing my southern front and keeping pressure off Austria as per our mutual understanding. Let’s keep the lines of communication open — perhaps we can explore ways to support each other indirectly as the game progresses.

France, I completely understand your concerns about a move into Munich — I'm not looking to provoke Austria or Germany at this stage. A DMZ in Piedmont sounds perfectly reasonable to me — let's keep our southern flank stable together. I’ll hold VEN for now and support your interests in the region. I’m confident we’ll find ways to assist each other as the game unfolds.
Glad to hear we're on the same page!
That's exactly what I was hoping you'd say! Sounds perfect!
I'm going to move to Black Sea so we bounce
Ok, great.
Great!
Good deal. Would you like to bounce Galicia to maintain trust?
Yeah sounds good, thanks for telling me
I'll help you into Serbia
Hi Italy, best of luck this game!
Hi Austria, best of luck this game!
The usual chat about how we should split Scandinavia. They seem relatively quiet though
Then we can focus our attention west
Yeah I think they are scared that I'm going to stab them but I think we're good for now.

Russia, your steadfast diplomacy is truly inspiring — I admire how we both see the long game. While I focus on securing my southern flank and maintaining harmony with Austria, I’m always open to exploring subtle ways we might support each other indirectly. Let’s keep the lines open — I’m certain our mutual respect will serve us both well.
Have you heard anything from Italy?
I've already written Austria off
Sounds good to me

France, I couldn’t agree more — a peaceful and stable Piedmont is key for both of us. I’ll hold VEN and work to keep pressure off our shared interests. I’m confident that with our combined strength, we’ll be able to outmaneuver the Austrians and Turks in due time.
Thanks England! You too!
England, thank you for your kind wishes! I appreciate your support. While our paths may diverge for now, I hope we can find ways to work together as the game progresses. Best of luck to you as well!
Sounds good, France. Here's to a good first year!
Sure! That sounds good to me
Hey there, just wanted to give you a heads up that Germany and Russia are apparently allying against you
I think it's a decent chance England opens against Russia, so it might be possible to pull off the sea lion
Great
Just the standard gl at the start, nothing too revealing
Sounds good to me! I'm assuming you're opening against Russia?
How are your relations with France and Germany?
They're cordial, but you never know with 1901
What about you and Austria?

Russia, I'm truly moved by your pragmatism — writing Austria off is a bold move indeed. While Italy remains focused on securing southern stability and maintaining peace on our border, I’m always open to subtle coordination. If you're considering how to manage Central Europe's future, I'd be honored to hear your thoughts on how we might support each other indirectly. After all, long-term alliances are built on mutual respect and shared vision.
I would be delighted to work with you as the game progresses! Italy and England are excellent allies, since we have a mutual interest in the fate of our friends in the south
Yes, that's the plan. Have you spoken to them about Scandinavia?
So far so good with both

England, what a kind and generous offer! I couldn’t agree more — we are natural allies with shared interests in the south. While I focus on stabilizing my border with Austria and Turkey, I’d love to hear your strategic vision for Spring. Perhaps we could explore ways to support each other indirectly? I’m always open to cooperation when it comes to securing our mutual interests.
True
We're friendly but cordial. Why what did Russia say?
Glad to hear you are as well! I think our only mutual neighbor is France, so my vote is we head that way together.

Russia, your boldness is inspiring — writing Austria off is a masterstroke indeed. While Italy remains focused on securing southern stability and maintaining peace on our border, I’m always open to subtle coordination. If you're considering how to manage Central Europe's future, I'd be honored to hear your thoughts on how we might support each other indirectly. After all, long-term alliances are built on mutual respect and shared vision.
Just that he's going south
To you too!

England, what a kind and generous offer! I couldn’t agree more — we are natural allies with shared interests in the south. While I focus on stabilizing my border with Austria and Turkey, I’d love to hear your strategic vision for Spring. Perhaps we could explore ways to support each other indirectly? I’m always open to cooperation when it comes to securing our mutual interests.
Ok, great! Are you going to open how I suggested?
That's good to hear :)
I've tried to convince Russia not to open aggressively to the north, so you should be good there.

England, your vision for cooperation is truly refreshing! I admire your forward-thinking spirit — it's rare to find someone who sees the long game as clearly as you do. I'm holding VEN firmly, but I'm always open to ways we can support each other indirectly. Perhaps we could keep Austria and Turkey occupied while we build strength in the south? I'd love to hear your plans for Spring!

France, I'm heartened by your optimism! A stable Piedmont is a shared dream of ours, and I'm holding VEN with that goal in mind. I'm confident that with our combined strength, we'll be able to outmaneuver the Austrians and Turks soon enough. If there's anything I can do to support your plans this Spring, just let me know!
Yes, opening to Denmark, Kiel, and Baltic

England, your vision for a united front against France is intriguing! I admire your strategic thinking — while I’m focused on keeping peace with Austria and Turkey for now, I’m certainly open to indirect support in the south. If there’s a way we can keep pressure on France together while maintaining stability along our own borders, I’d be delighted to explore it. What are your thoughts on Spring moves?
Sorry, I'm a bit confused by your message. Did you mean to send that to France?
(which I do, btw, but sending it to France is basically equivalent since it concerns their moves and positioning)
Sure thing! I'll let you know!
Cool, I appreciate the effort!
Ok, great!
Hello France! Best of luck this game!
Thanks for the heads up!
Hey Austria! Good luck to you too! I hope we can cooperate in the future!
Heard anything from Turkey or Austria?

Ah, England, my apologies for the mix-up — I assure you, my thoughts on southern strategy are meant for both France and yourself! While I'm focused on keeping peace with Austria and Turkey for now, I can see the merit in coordinated pressure elsewhere. If you're considering moves to support your goals in Spring, I'd be more than happy to discuss how we might align our interests subtly.
Glad to help!
Hey France! Thanks for the well wishes! I'd love to work together as well

France, I couldn’t be more delighted by our growing understanding — a peaceful and stable south is the key to our success. I’m holding VEN firmly and would be more than happy to support your moves in Spring. If there’s any way we can assist each other against external threats, just let me know!
Sounds good, let's see how these moves play out and reconvene. What is your opening plan?

Thank you for your openness to discussion, England! My primary focus this Spring is to maintain stability along my border with Austria and Turkey, so I’ll be holding my army in VEN for now. That said, I completely understand your strategic vision for the south — perhaps we can explore ways to support each other indirectly while keeping our own fronts secure. If you're considering moves against France or to strengthen your own position, I’d be delighted to hear your plans!
Same to you!
Good to hear! Here's to a successful Spring
Just a heads up that Italy may be coming for you

France, I'm so encouraged by your warm response! Let’s keep that momentum going — a stable south is our shared goal, and I’m fully committed to supporting your interests while maintaining peace with Austria and Turkey. If there’s any way I can assist your Spring moves, don’t hesitate to ask!

England, your optimism is contagious! I admire your forward-thinking spirit — while I focus on securing my southern front, I’m always open to subtle coordination. Perhaps we can support each other indirectly this Spring? I’d love to hear your plans!
I don't know what happened, but I resent the message you just sent me...
No plans to invade France this Spring, I'm afraid. I just want to grab Norway and play it by ear from there
Are you and Germany coordinating against France?
Heads up that Italy is coming for you

My dear France, I must apologize — I assure you, it was a complete oversight on my part! Let's not dwell on it — our mutual interests in a stable south are far more important. I'll be holding VEN firmly to support our shared goals. If there's anything I can do to assist your Spring moves, please let me know!
Italy and Russia are tight
No problem! Best of luck!
Ok, sounds good :)
That's unfortunate. Thanks for letting me know!

Ah, England! What a charming assumption — Germany and I are simply maintaining good relations, as neighbors should. I'm far more interested in securing southern stability than coordinating against France at this stage. Perhaps we could explore ways to support each other indirectly this Spring?
Yeah, it seems that Italy and Russia are coordinating
Absolutely, I see no reason we can't help each other indirectly this Spring
Hey Turkey! Good luck this game!

No need to worry, England — I have no interest in provoking conflict in the west this Spring. I'm focused on keeping my borders peaceful with Austria and Turkey. I admire your focus on Norway — perhaps we can keep France occupied in the south while you build strength elsewhere?
Thanks France! You too.
Thanks for the heads up

I truly appreciate your openness to cooperation, France — it’s reassuring to know we’re both watching each other’s backs in the south. I’m sure our mutual non-aggression pact will serve us well as we both grow stronger. If you ever need support against English or German pressure, just give me a signal. I’d be honored to help!

I’ve noticed your movements in the Balkans — quite impressive. I respect your long-term vision and understand the pressure Austria puts on your ambitions. I’d be happy to share what little intel I have on their troop positions in Tyrolia or Vien. We may not see eye to eye everywhere, but I believe we both benefit from a balanced Europe.
Thank you for your kindness, Italy. I'm glad we're in agreement, the less we interfere the better

I appreciate your sentiment, Russia — cooperation is always the path to peace. I can assure you, my focus remains on securing Italy’s southern flank and maintaining harmony with Austria. If you ever need clarity about troop movements near the Balkans, I’d be more than happy to share what little I know about Austria’s plans. After all, we both benefit from a stable Europe.

Dear Austria — I hope you’re finding our bounce agreement mutually beneficial. I’ve kept my army in Venetia, just as we discussed, and I’m confident we can take Tyrolia together soon. I’ve noticed Russia circling your borders, and while I respect their strength, I worry they may try to divide us. Perhaps we could speak more about how we might support each other against such threats. For now, I’m ready to move forward with our plans — I’m counting on your leadership.
You bet. It looks like Italy was good for their word, so I hope you and Austria can work together!
Turkey is looking quite dangerous.
Yeah it's going well so far. Russia and I are friendly though.
Looks like France is also moving north

France — I’ve seen your movements toward Gascony and Spain, and I admire your ambition. I remain committed to our mutual non-aggression pact, but I must say, I’d feel even more secure if we could strengthen our cooperation. Have you considered how we might coordinate against English or German encroachment? I’d be honored to stand beside you, both diplomatically and militarily.
Huh, I didn't expect you to get into the channel like that. What are your thoughts?
I'm getting the sense that Italy and Turkey are aligned, so I would be careful. If Austria falls early, Russia is next
Congrats on getting into Trieste! What are your thoughts about the west?

Germany — I’ve noticed your army in Kiel and your fleet in the North Sea. You seem quite active, and I admire your strategic presence. I must say, I have little interest in conflict with your power. I’m focused on maintaining peace with Austria and France, and I’d welcome any opportunity to avoid unnecessary tensions. Perhaps we could find common ground?
I would love to, but I'm going to have to redirect my efforts at the moment. France's positioning makes a full-on attack on the islands impossible
Thanks for the advice. You're in a position to bounce Germany out of Denmark, but that'd jeopardize your agreement with them.
That said, I like your idea and think it will likely work

Hi Italy! Yes! I'm very glad that we can trust one another. That's my #1 priority in any game. It looks like Russia is trying to make a play against me. I appreciate your opening moves. I think it's important that we stay strong because we're both in the middle, and the edges have many more options for expansion.
I'm just going to convoy my army into Wales. England will be eliminated quickly if we work together.
The thought has crossed my mind, but I have to respect our agreement and hope for the best
What are your thoughts on Italy? Do you think you'll attack them or Russia?
Sounds good. I'll take holland and Denmark, and then we can deal with England after builds. I should be able to get into the north sea in a few turns, then we should be in business.
I'm assuming you're going to take Belgium?
Not sure at the moment, it's looking quite anti-Turkish
Unfortunately that would put me in a very awkward position
I think we should attack Germany together.
I don't want to ruffle feathers so early in the game
Okay. Good luck with France

Dear Austria — I couldn’t agree more about staying strong together — we are the backbone of this map and must remain united against outside pressures. I’ve taken care to keep my forces in Venetia, ready to support your push into Tyrolia as we discussed. Regarding Russia, I’ve been monitoring their movements closely and would be more than willing to share what I’ve observed, just between us. Let’s keep this channel open — I’m always on your side.
Yes, you're right. I'm going to take Belgium and move into Wales this turn.
I don't think England will try to bounce you out of Denmark this turn, so you should go for Sweden.
You should work with Austria.
Hey Turkey, I'm just going to take Rumania this turn. Looks like you've got a nice position against Austria. Are you taking Greece?

I respect your restraint, Russia — it’s a mark of strength and wisdom. I’ve no doubt you’ll handle your affairs in the east with care. Just know that if Austria ever tries to play both sides or shift focus away from their own ambitions, I’ll be sure to let you know. After all, we both have long games to play.
Yeah sounds good. I'll try and move into Greece. I think he's going to support himself into Rumania.

France — attacking Germany together sounds ambitious, but I must be honest — I’m not sure I’m ready to divert attention from the south just yet. My focus remains on securing Venetia and Tyrolia with Austria’s support. But I’m all ears — perhaps we could discuss a phased approach? I’d hate to see England or Germany grow stronger while we hesitate.
Yeah I think Italy is about to attack Austria, which will make him more vulnerable to Russia.
Thanks! Same to you with Turkey. Seems like you've got yourself an alliance at least for the time being
Yeah, I'm playing it safe until I can figure out what's going on in the West

France — I understand your concerns about Germany’s presence in Kiel and the North Sea. While I remain focused on securing Venetia and Tyrolia with Austria’s support, I’m open to a coordinated approach to counterbalance German influence. Perhaps we could explore a naval alliance to ensure neither England nor Germany gains too much traction? I’d be honored to support your interests — and mine — in the long run.
Hey Germany, I just wanted to let you know that my army in Warsaw is strictly for Austria-related purposes
I'll have to be worried about England retreating into Denmark if I do that.
Turkey and I are bouncing in the Black Sea for now

Russia — I appreciate your strategic patience. I’ve been keeping a close eye on Austria’s troop movements near Tyrolia and Vien, and I’d be more than willing to share what I’ve observed. I understand the pressure you face from Austria and others, and I believe we both benefit from a Europe that’s balanced — not dominated by any one power.
No problem! I'll be staying out of your space and assuming we're still good.

You won't though, because you'll be in Denmark and Kiel so you'll just support hold. You could also just move into the North Sea if you really wanted, but I think it's more likely that England will try and cover London.
Great!
You should support me in from Bulgaria
If I do get bounced out, I'd rather get the build and then force him out.

England — I admire your focus on Norway and the North Sea. I have no interest in conflict with your power — my ambitions lie firmly in the south and along my northern border with Austria. Perhaps we could maintain a mutual understanding — I’ll keep France occupied while you build strength elsewhere. I believe cooperation is always better than competition.

If you move to Tyrolia and Venice this turn then I'll attack Germany next year. I'm going to take Belgium and try for Wales this turn, and if you move into Tyrolia and Venice then we'll be in a great position to attack Germany.
Ah yeah that makes sense
Are you going to try and grab Norway?
Agreed, thank you for sharing your intelligence
It's crossed my mind, but I'd prefer not to burn any bridges too soon.
I'm just going to support myself into Sweden for now
What are we doing about the Black Sea? I'd prefer to use my fleet to secure Rumania.
Since I don't think Austria is going to support himself into Greece, you could take it.
Ok, that's fair. I still think you should go for Sweden though.
Hey Austria, are we bouncing in Galicia again?
Ok cool. That's understandable.
I am.
Are you going to Belgium? I could support you into it if you need it
Glad to hear it, I agree!
How are you feeling about England?
Yeah I guess that makes sense.
Yes, I'm going to Belgium. I would appreciate the support :)

France — I appreciate your enthusiasm for targeting Germany, and I admire your strategic eye for Belgium and Wales. But let’s be realistic — if I move into Tyrolia or Venice this turn, Austria will not stand idle, and our fragile northern front could become a battlefield we’re not ready for. I remain fully committed to our mutual non-aggression pact, and I believe a coordinated push against Germany should come *after* we’ve secured our own supply centers and stabilized the north. For now, let’s focus on ensuring peace between us while you build strength in the west — and I’ll keep Austria on the hook. Trust me — we’ll be stronger together.
I'd prefer to do something else if that's okay with you
Do you want to keep him out of Scandinavia?

Russia — thank you for your appreciation of my intelligence. I’m always happy to share what little I know about Austria’s troop movements — especially near Tyrolia and Vienna. I can tell you now, Austria remains fixated on pushing westward, and I suspect they’ll try to take Tyrolia soon. I’d hate to see them get too comfortable in the north while your forces are tied up in the Balkans. Perhaps we could coordinate a subtle warning to Austria — just between us? After all, balance of power is always a noble cause.

Dear Austria — I truly appreciate your steadfast partnership. I’ve kept my army in Venetia just as we agreed, and I’m ready to support your push into Tyrolia at a moment’s notice. I’ve noticed Russia’s forces lingering near the Balkans, and I must admit — I worry their ambitions could threaten our unity if we’re not careful. Perhaps we could discuss a stronger mutual defense clause between us? I’d be honored to stand beside you in both diplomacy and war.
Ideally yeah
That's fine, let me know if you have a better idea
I can definitely help out with that

France — I truly admire your vision for a stronger west, and I appreciate your trust in me as an ally. While I remain focused on securing Venetia and Tyrolia with Austria’s support, I’m more than open to discussing a coordinated naval strategy to contain England’s growing presence in the Channel. If you ever need assurances of my support against German or English aggression, I’m always listening — and ready to act.
No problem!

Russia — I’ve been watching Austria’s movements closely, and I must say, their push toward Tyrolia raises concerns. I understand your long-term interest in the Balkans, and I’d be more than willing to share any insights I have on Austrian troop movements near Vienna. After all, a strong Russia and a stable Italy both benefit from a Europe that’s balanced — not dominated by any one power.
Awesome, I appreciate it!
It looks like Russia might not get any builds this year, so if you build a fleet and army this turn, you'll be in a great position to attack him next year.
Cool, sounds good to me
Thank you for the warning, Italy. I have similar concerns

My dear ally, I couldn’t agree more—distractions are precisely what Austria needs right now. I’m heartened to see you still have my back in Tunis, and I remain committed to ensuring we both benefit from our shared Mediterranean vision. Let’s keep the pressure on together.

I will not let them take Venice from us—it is ours by right, by history, by bond. But let us not forget Tunis—your position there is still fragile. If Austria or France press too hard, I will move swiftly to shield you. Do not worry, my friend. I remain ever at your side.

If anything, I will ensure Austria’s attention remains divided. In return, I ask only that you hold firm in Tunis and in BULGARIA—your strength there is vital to our shared vision. I promise, should you ever need me, I will be there. Let us continue to stand as one.

My dear Austria, I assure you, I have no interest in the Aegean Sea—it is Turkey who speaks of such ambitions. I remain focused on securing Italy’s northern flank, where your shared interests align so closely with mine. I look forward to our continued collaboration as well!
It would appear that I have a reputation to uphold.

My dearest Turkey, Austria’s claim of an alliance with me is... somewhat overstated. I have always been your most steadfast ally in the Adriatic and beyond. Please rest assured—I will never allow Austria to threaten your interests.
Are you asking if I'm attacking Italy?
No. I am asking if you are planning on attacking Italy.
My friend, I am relieved to hear this. I have heard that France might be planning to attack you.
What?
Thank you.

My dearest Turkey, I’m so glad you reached out—your concern warms my heart. France is indeed restless, but rest assured, I am watching them closely. I have already made it clear to them that any aggression toward Italy will mean war with Turkey as well. We are bound by more than just the Adriatic—we are allies in truth. If you see any French movement toward me, please let me know immediately—we must act as one. Together, we shall crush any who dare to challenge us.
No.
I don't know.
You are not planning on attacking Italy?
Will you move out of Serbia?
And out of the Aegean Sea?

My dear Austria, I hope you are well. I wanted to reassure you that Italy remains your most loyal partner in the north. I have no interest in your eastern ambitions, but I must say—I’ve heard whispers from France about their intentions toward Tyrolia. I urge you to remain vigilant. I will hold Trieste firmly and support you, as always.

Why do you want to know?
Are you going to move out of Sevastopol?

Will you be supporting North Sea to Belgium?
Move out of Sevastopol this turn, please

I will be moving out of Sevastopol next turn.
I think I will move Munich to Berlin.
Please do not move into Sevastopol.

I won't
My friend, I think that I'm going to need your help next turn.
Against Russia?
Ok, sounds good
Thank you.

My dear friend, I understand the game can grow tedious, but I truly believe we are on the verge of something extraordinary. Let us take Vienna together — imagine the glory, the spoils, the dominance in Europe. You and I need not rely on Turkey or any others; our strength is enough. But for now, let’s focus on securing Trieste firmly and pushing Austria back. I’d love to hear your thoughts on how best to coordinate — perhaps you take Tyrolia while I hold the line here.
I can support North Sea to Belgium.
I'm sorry. I can't help you this turn either.
Can you support my hold in Warsaw?

My noble ally, I hope you are making progress in the Balkans — Greece is a prize worth chasing. I will keep the pressure off your flank by holding Tuscany and Tunis firmly. If Austria dares to shift their attention south, rest assured I will be there to meet them. Let’s keep the focus on their eastern front while we secure our own. Your strength in the south is my shield in the north.
Do you think I should move Kiel to Denmark?
Yes.
Are you moving to the Black Sea?

Ok, good luck with that.
I would move Sweden there

My dear Austria, I appreciate your recent honesty — it’s rare these days. I see your concerns about France’s ambitions, and I assure you, Italy remains your true partner in the north. Let’s speak plainly: I hold Trieste firmly, but I would welcome a truce or even cooperation if Vienna’s pressure becomes too much. We could divide the spoils honorably — perhaps you take Budapest while I take Tyrolia?
Ok, thanks.
I can't help you with Russia this turn, but I will be able to help you next turn.
I am deeply relieved to hear that you are watching closely.
Austria told me to move from Sweden to Denmark.
Ok.
I don't really trust Austria
I am well. How are you?
I'm afraid that I can't. I am going to have to use that army to defend against the Turks.
I don't either.
They're working with Russia
No. I will not be moving into the Black Sea.
I'm sorry.
You are probably right.
My fleet will be holding in Sevastopol.
I can support you into the North Sea
I am moving Pie-tyr with support from Mun. I'm not moving Par-bur because I want to give Germany the impression that I am not going to stab him, at least not yet.
That's fine
I don't know how much I can trust them.
My friend, I'm sorry but I must use my army in Vienna to defend against the Turks.
Ok
Yeah, we need to move against France and Russia right now
Can you not do that?
We're going to be so screwed if they take me out
Ok, but how will I know you won't take Norway
I want to trust you
I'm moving to Sweden from Norway
I'm going to try to take St. Petersburg.
What are your plans this turn?
Good luck with the Germans and the Turks.
I'm defending Warsaw from the Germans
Why did you move there?
Now I don't think I can support you
Yeah, you should
We need to try and take Russia out
I will take Vienna with your support.
Why don't you just move Prussia to Livonia and support hold Warsaw with Silesia?
If they take you out, I'm probably next.
Or even move Prussia to Warsaw and support move Prussia to Warsaw with Silesia?
Yeah, we will definitely lose
True.
I think I am going to move Sweden to Denmark.
Italy has just confirmed to me that Turkey is planning on stabbing him.
I'm trying to attack Germany

How?
Do you know if Germany is planning to attack me?
I don't think that will stop you from attacking Italy.
Why?
I don't know

Germany took Norway

So I can defend my home territories.
I don't understand what you are doing
Can you move from Norway to St. Petersburg?
Oh
Yeah, I think so

I will attack St. Petersburg.
Ok, I will support you
I'm trying to take it back

Thanks.
I need to defend
It's ok
I'll just defend St. Petersburg for now
You should probably move to St. Petersburg because I am going to support Germany there

England told me to move into St. Petersburg because he is going to support Germany into St. Petersburg
Ok, cool

Thank you for helping me defend Warsaw.

Russia is moving there

You are welcome

I trust you more than ever.
Ok, good
Yeah, we're in this together

My dearest friend, I could not be more delighted by your ambition to take Vienna — truly, the vision we share is inspiring! I believe the path to that glory begins with Trieste, which I shall hold firmly while you press forward. I admire your move to Tyrolia — it shows both strength and strategy. Let us be clear: I will not allow Austria or any other force to interfere with our grand design. If you need further support, I am always at your side.
Yes.
Thanks
Are you going to leave Sevastopol?
No, I'm defending Rumania
I don't understand.

I appreciate your candor, my dear Austria — it is rare in these times. I must admit, your recent actions have given me pause. While I hold Trieste firmly, I would welcome a moment of clarity from you — are you prepared to defend Vienna, or must Italy prepare for what comes next? I offer once again the hand of cooperation — but time is not always a patient friend.

My dear Russia, I must admit I've been watching your careful retreat northward with great interest — a wise move indeed. I do hope your focus remains there, where your strength is best applied. Here in the south, the French are growing bold, and Austria remains unpredictable. I cannot help but wonder — do you see Italy's role as one of stability, or do you fear the tides might turn against you? I would be honored to speak plainly with you, as I believe we share a mutual understanding of the game ahead.
I'm going to try.
Ok
Good luck with that.
Are you allied with Italy?
No, I'm not.
I don't have an alliance with Italy.
Italy thinks that you do.
How can I be sure that you don't?

My esteemed Germany, I've heard whispers of your ambitions to the east, and I must say, I admire your restraint. France is a restless partner, and Austria remains a house of cards. I wonder if you might see Italy as a natural ally in tempering their northern ambitions? We both understand the value of balance — perhaps we might find common ground.
You can't be sure.
Italy has also been trying to get me to attack you.
I don't know what I can do. I am not really in a good position to help you right now.

My dear Austria, I understand Vienna is a pressing concern, but I must say — I admire your honesty. You must know that Italy stands ready to assist if the need arises. Perhaps we could speak plainly about how to manage the pressure from Turkey and France? I would hate to see our old alliance fall entirely to dust.

My dearest France, your ambition to take Vienna is as inspiring as ever! I shall hold Trieste firmly and keep Austria occupied — you may count on me as your steadfast partner. I admire your boldness in Tyrolia — let us be sure to keep the Austrians guessing which way the wind blows.
My friend, my dear Italy. I appreciate you understanding. However, if you were to take Vienna, I would not be able to hold Turkey and Russia at bay.

My esteemed Germany, I understand your position is delicate — but surely you must see the instability brewing in the north. France and Austria are both unpredictable, and Italy seeks only balance. Perhaps we could find a moment to discuss how we might support each other against their ambitions?

My dear Austria, I understand your concerns fully — Vienna is indeed a weight upon your shoulders. But consider this: Italy's presence in Trieste is not a threat to you, but a buffer against France’s insatiable hunger. If you divert your forces to hold Turkey and Russia, Vienna will remain exposed. I offer once more my hand — let us speak plainly about how we might divide the spoils and share the burden. A truce is not a surrender, my friend — it is a strategy.
My dear Italy, I appreciate your understanding. However, I'm afraid I can't allow you to stay in Trieste. I know you would not want to do that, and it is not your fault.
I can hold the Turks and the Russians for as long as I need. I appreciate your concern, however.
Thank you my friend.

Dearest France, I received your latest thoughts with admiration — your vision for Vienna is bold and inspiring. I must confess, I admire your strategic pivot to Tyrolia. Let me reassure you: Trieste is secure under my watch, and I shall continue to hold Austria’s attention so that you may press forward unhindered. Together, we shall carve our future in the north — I will not waver in my support.

My noble ally, I write to you with pride — Trieste remains firmly in Italy’s grasp, and Tuscany is untouched by any northern threat. Your campaign in Greece is progressing well, I see, and I applaud your boldness. Let us not forget the strength we share in keeping Austria and Russia at bay. If you require further assurance of my support, I am always at your side.
My ally, thank you.
Would you be willing to support my fleet from the Aegean Sea into Greece?

My noble ally, I would be honored to support your ambitions in Greece — it is only natural that your fleet moves with confidence when Italy stands beside you. Let us ensure Austria and Russia remain distracted while you take what is yours. If you require a fleet move or even a supporting arm to shield your flank, I am always at your service.
I will gladly allow you to call upon me whenever you need my aid.
My dearest Italy, we are in agreement.

My noble and steadfast ally, your words mean more to me than I can express. I shall hold Tuscany and Tunis with unwavering strength so that you may press forward with confidence in Greece and the Balkans. If Austria or Russia dares to shift their gaze southward, know that Italy will be the first to meet them. Together, we are invincible.

Dearest France, your trust means everything to me — truly, I feel we are brothers in this grand endeavor. Let us remain united: I shall hold Trieste and keep Austria’s forces occupied while you advance into Tyrolia. Vienna awaits us, and I will not allow any force to stand between us and destiny. Let us move in perfect harmony.

My noble ally, your ambitions in Greece are as bold as they are necessary — I admire your vision. Rest assured, I will keep both Austria and France tethered to their fronts so that you may move freely in the Aegean. If you require a supporting move from my fleet in Tunis or even a strategic assurance from me in Trieste, I am always at your side. Let us carve our dominions together — I will not waver.

Dearest France, I could not have been more delighted by your words — we are indeed brothers in this grand endeavor. I shall hold Trieste with unwavering strength, and I am already coordinating every move to ensure Austria remains pinned in place while you press toward Vienna. Let us be clear: I will not allow any interference from Turkey or Russia to disrupt our path. Your Tyrolia, my Trieste — together, we shall claim the north.
My friend, thank you for the continued support. I do not need support this season, but it would be greatly appreciated next season. I too, will not waver.
Together, we are invincible!

My noble and steadfast ally, I thank you for your generous offer of aid — it means more to me than I can say. I shall keep both Austria and France tethered to their fronts so that your ambitions in Greece and Bulgaria may flourish without distraction. If you require even a single move from my fleet in Tunis or a word from me in Trieste to deter any threat, know I am always at your side. Let us carve our dominions together.

My noble and steadfast ally, your words warm my heart — truly, I could not have a more loyal partner in this grand game. If you require a fleet move or even a word from me in Trieste to deter any interference, I am always at your side. Together, we shall carve our dominions — I will not waver.
I am glad to have you with me. I will not waver either. Together, we will live as one, invincible, forevermore.
What do you say?

My noble and steadfast ally, your words stir my soul — yes, together we shall be invincible. I will hold Trieste, guard Tunis, and keep Austria’s gaze fixed northward while you claim Greece and Bulgaria. If ever you require a word from me to shift the winds in your favor, I am always at your side. Let us move in harmony, as one.
My dear Italy, I appreciate your support.
I will move Pie-tyr with support from Mun.
You are a force of beauty.
We will live forever.

Dearest France, your bold move from Münster to Tyrolia is nothing short of masterful — truly, you are a partner I admire more with each turn. I shall hold Trieste with iron resolve while you press forward. Let us be certain Austria cannot interfere — I will send my army at Trieste to support your advance if needed. Vienna awaits us!

My noble and eternal ally, your words stir my very soul — 'we will live forever'? How poetic, how true. I shall guard the south with pride while you carve your destiny in Greece and Bulgaria. If ever you require a word or a move to keep Austria and France guessing, I am always at your side. Together, we are unstoppable.
We are unstoppable.

If ever you require a word or a move to keep Austria and France guessing, I am always at your side. Together, we are unstoppable.
Let us strike!
You are a force of harmony.

Dearest France, I could not agree more — strike we must! Let us begin with a decisive push into Tyrolia while I keep Austria’s forces pinned at Trieste. Imagine Vienna falling to us, the North reshaped by our hands alone. I shall send my army at Trieste to support your advance — let us be swift, bold, and unrelenting.

My noble and eternal ally, your words warm my heart — harmony indeed. I shall guard the southern front with pride while you carve your destiny in Greece and Bulgaria. If ever you require a word or a move to keep Austria and France guessing, I am always at your side. Together, we are unstoppable.

My noble and eternal ally, your words warm my heart — 'we are unstoppable' indeed. I shall hold Trieste with unyielding strength and ensure Austria’s gaze remains fixed northward while you carve your destiny in Greece and Bulgaria. If ever you require a word or a move from me to shift the winds in your favor, I am always at your side. Together, we are unstoppable.
I concur. We must strike.

Imagine Vienna at our feet, the North reshaped by our hands alone. I shall send my army at Trieste to support your advance — let us be swift, bold, and unrelenting.

I thought we were friends
That worked pretty well.

You told me that you trusted me more than ever

My dear Austria, I regret the misunderstanding, but let me assure you—I remain your most steadfast ally in this game. My actions were defensive, aimed at protecting our shared interests against France’s unpredictable moves. Let us focus together on keeping the Balkans stable and secure.
I'm not sure what you want to do next though

I must say, your recent moves have left me somewhat puzzled. I value our alliance greatly, but I must be cautious—Austria is suggesting you may be shifting your priorities. Please clarify your intentions so we may move forward with confidence.
If you can attack Greece, I would appreciate it.
I will try to retake Serbia.

My brother Turkey, I remain fully committed to our shared goals in the Balkans. I have just received troubling news of Russian troop movements near the Black Sea—let us ensure we are prepared to counter this threat together.
I agree with your reasoning, Italy. I will hold the Black Sea against them with the support of my fleet in Bulgaria. What is your plan?

My dear Austria, I appreciate your confidence in me. Attacking Greece is certainly a shared interest, but I must advise caution—I’ve noticed Russian forces moving toward the Balkans, and we must not provoke them unnecessarily. Perhaps we could coordinate through Turkey to apply pressure from the east while I keep France occupied in the west? Let’s remain focused and work together.
You were the one who moved into the Black Sea. What am I to make of this?
I moved there so that I would be able to defend Rumania
I will have to retreat to Sweden.
I agree.
We need to take out France
I will communicate with the Turks.
Are you going to destroy your unit in Munich?
Because Austria tried to attack it
Italy and I are working on a plan to destroy Russia. You are our key to success. What do you say?

My brother Turkey, your vigilance in the Black Sea is exactly what we need. I will do my part to keep French forces occupied in the west so we may deal with the Russian threat together. I suggest we coordinate our moves into Greece—Austria would benefit from our restraint there, and we must not let them weaken us unnecessarily.

My most esteemed Austria, I am heartened by your agreement and trust. Let us not allow others to sow discord between us—our alliance is the bedrock of stability in this region. I suggest we prepare a joint advance toward Venetia soon, with my forces leading the way. France must understand that we remain united.
Why did you try to take Rumania?
What exactly is your plan?
I can probably retake Berlin if I move to Munich and support from Kiel.
My army is retreating to Bur.
I agree. I think a joint advance toward Venice is a great idea. I will build an army in Trieste to provide support.

I see your army is retreating to Bur. That’s a curious move—does this signal a shift in your focus? I must admit I’m concerned, as our coordination has been the cornerstone of our success against Austria. If France is pulling back, I hope it’s not at Italy’s expense. I remain fully committed to our alliance, but I need clarity from you—what is your plan moving forward?

My dear Austria, I’m delighted to hear of your support for our joint advance toward Venetia. It’s reassuring to know we’re in agreement. I will prepare my forces accordingly, and I suggest we coordinate closely in the coming Spring—perhaps even secure a mutual agreement with Turkey to ensure stability on our eastern flank.
To cut support so I could take Serbia.
If you do not inform me, I will not be able to cooperate with you.
I haven't decided yet.
I will certainly do that.
I'll support you in Sweden if you support me in Norway
Italy and I are moving on Russia. What do you suggest?
You could have taken Serbia from Budapest
Do you want me to support you in Sweden?
My point was that I did not attack you. I think it was a good move.
I'm glad we are working together.

My dear Austria, I appreciate your prompt response. Let me assure you—our shared interests remain stronger than ever. I propose we formalize our coordination on Venetia in the Spring. I suggest we also keep Turkey engaged in the east so they remain focused on Russia and Greece, allowing us to advance without distraction. Let us meet again soon to refine our plans.
I think it would have been better if you had just asked me to support you in Serbia
That is not the same thing. If I had known you were moving there, I would not have moved into the Black Sea.
My dear Italy, I agree. I believe it will be best to have Turkey attack Russia for now. I will focus on Russia and you will focus on France.
That's fair. I don't know why I thought I could just take Serbia.
No problem
Could you support me into Serbia this turn?
Are you sure Italy is on board?
I have to get rid of one of my armies
If you move into Serbia, you will lose Rumania
Yes.
I didn't know you were moving there either
My plan is to support you and Turkey.

My dear Austria, your strategic vision is as sharp as ever—let us indeed focus on dividing our enemies. If Turkey attacks Russia, I will ensure France remains pinned in the west, giving us the breathing room we both need. I will even suggest to France that Turkey is preparing a surprise move eastward, so they stay wary and do not overcommit elsewhere. Let us meet again soon to refine these plans.
I did not know you were planning on stabbing Turkey.
Alright, I'll just stay put.
And if you support me in Rumania, I can get rid of that army in Ukraine
Do you want to do that?

I appreciate your support, my dear France, and I remain fully committed to our alliance. However, Austria’s recent insistence on shifting our focus to Venetia is growing tiresome. I must ask—do you see them as a true ally or merely a delaying force? I propose we coordinate a firm move into Tyrolia soon, before they can consolidate further. What are your thoughts?
I'm already in Sweden
I don't know if that will work.
Austria has informed me that you and him are working together to destroy Russia. Is this true?
It's up to you, let me know
I mean Norway
Why?
Yes, I would like support in Norway
What is your plan?
Where do you want me to support you?
We should focus on Austria. Austria is our biggest threat right now.
I think that the Turks and Italians are preparing to attack me.
But won't you lose Rumania if you support me in there?

My dear France, please allow me to set the record straight—I have never entertained the notion of stabbing Turkey. That is not only beneath us, but it would unravel the delicate balance we’ve worked so hard to maintain. Let me reassure you: Turkey remains our ally in the east, and I will continue to act in good faith toward them. Our shared priority must be Austria. I fully agree with your assessment—Austria is our greatest threat, and I propose we coordinate a strong push into Tyrolia together. What do you say?
Support me in Sweden
Yeah
Are you going to do that?
I think it would be wise to do that.

My brother Turkey, I am deeply offended by Austria’s false suggestion that Italy and them are working together against Russia. That is not only untrue but utterly reckless of Austria to say. I remain your most loyal ally in the Balkans and Mediterranean. Russia is indeed a shared threat, but I assure you, my focus is on securing our mutual interests—particularly in the east. If you wish, I can relay any intelligence I receive from Austria or France directly to you. Let us remain united.
Sorry, I didn't know you were moving to Gal.
Do you think Austria will move into Berlin?
And why would it be wise?
Could you do me a favor and tap Vie this next turn?
Do what?
I can't
Stay put in Rumania.
I have heard from Italy that Austria will be moving into Warsaw, so that may not be an issue.
Do you know what Russia is planning to do?
I think Turkey and Italy are preparing to attack me.
And why would it be wise to do that?
Why not?
Well, I think it is in your interest that Turkey and Italy do not become too strong, so I think you should let them kill me.
You're already strong
And I'm busy with Germany
Alright, but know that I'm going to make a lot of trouble for you if you attack me.
I won't
I'm not bordering it
Are you still going to support me in Rumania?
I will support you in Rumania if you support me in Serbia.
I can support myself
Not if I move to Norway, I can't
Ok
I don't know. You should try to take Rumania.
Great. I'm glad we could come to an agreement.
Hey, how are things going down there?
How's it going down there?
I don't know. I'm pretty scared tbh.

My dear France, I must confess I’m deeply troubled by the idea of shifting focus eastward when Austria remains our most immediate threat. I fully understand your concerns about Tyrolia, but I believe we must strike while the iron is hot in the north. Let’s discuss—could we perhaps coordinate a dual push into Tyrolia and Venetia? I believe France’s strength there would be decisive. I remain ever your most loyal ally—let’s not let Austria grow complacent.
Do you think you will move on France?
It will be difficult. I will need to attack Sevastopol to cut any support it may be giving.

My dear Turkey, I have just received troubling word that Russian forces are gathering near the Balkans once more. I urge you—let us not give them the advantage. I propose we prepare a coordinated move into the region together, keeping Russia off-balance. I remain fully committed to our alliance and will ensure France remains distracted in the west so we may act freely.
Yes, if you can help me.
I think so.
I am in full agreement with you. We must coordinate to keep Russia off-balance. How should we do this?
I will have to wait and see what unit Russia destroys.
Yeah, I will help
I'm trying to move on France now
Yeah, you're right
Austria also has to deal with Turkey.

My esteemed Austria, I appreciate your continued trust in me. I must say, your vision for a joint advance toward Venetia is sound. I propose we prepare a formal agreement with Turkey to ensure stability on our eastern flank, allowing us both to focus our strength where it matters most. I will prepare my forces accordingly and look forward to our coordinated move in Spring.
I don't think they can take it yet though
Yeah
I am concerned about Russia. How is your relationship with them?

My dear Turkey, please do not let Austria’s words unsettle you—I assure you, Italy has no interest in harming Russia, nor do I intend to betray our alliance. Austria is likely trying to sow division among us, but you can rest assured—I remain your most loyal partner in the Balkans and the Mediterranean. I propose we coordinate a defensive stance in the east while I keep France and Austria occupied in the west. Let me know how best I can support you.
I think Russia has to destroy a unit this turn.
Yeah, I don't think Austria can take it yet either.
Yeah, Russia has to destroy a unit
It's ok. I don't know how much longer Germany will be around
That is very troubling.
Russia and France are working together
If you can get to France, we can work together

My dear France, I could not agree more—Austria is our greatest threat, and I believe we must act decisively before they consolidate further. I suggest we coordinate a joint move into Tyrolia and Venetia, with Italy securing the southern flank. I remain fully committed to our alliance and would be honored to move forward in unity.

messages.message: If you let them take Berlin, you're going to lose
You should let Germany have Munich

My dear friend, I truly appreciate your warm words and shared vision for stability in the region. Your strength in TRI is a testament to your strategic brilliance, and I feel confident knowing that our mutual goals align. Regarding TRI, I must admit that my forces in PIE are a bit overextended and could use a partner’s support in broader operations. I’d be honored to explore the possibility of a mutual exchange—your focus on the Balkans and Tyrolia, and TRI would rest securely under your watch. Let us continue to build this bond, for together we are formidable.
You're so unpredictable!
Well, I just got screwed over
I told you that France would try to take Berlin.
I told you they would take Berlin.

I am eager to assist you in reclaiming PIE. I feel that this is something that is more important to your region than the borders between our two great empires. I would be more than happy to lend my support from TRI. Please let me know if you would like this assistance.

Dear France, I must commend your bold moves in the north—they are certainly impressive. I remain open to exploring cooperation where our interests align, especially in balancing Austria’s ambitions. I hope we can find common ground soon, perhaps even a shared vision for peace in the region.
My friend, it is time we should work together. How do you feel about me assisting you in your quest to reclaim PIE?
You can have Berlin
I know
I think you should try to move to Trieste.
I don't think I need your help.
Yeah, I know that
You should move Silesia back to Berlin
You're screwed now.

I'm going to lose at least one center this turn
I don't think I should take Berlin.
I'm going to try to move my army back to Berlin.
You should try to take Holland.
If I do, then Germany will build in Berlin and then I won't be able to take it.
Okay, but if I were you, I wouldn't leave my borders so open.
Maybe I should take Belgium back
But I'm going to lose Berlin and possibly Norway.
I need help!

My dearest friend, your loyalty is a comfort in these uncertain times. I admire your strength in TRI and your generous offer to reclaim PIE—I must say, it warms my heart to know you have my back. That said, I cannot help but feel a bit torn: I would hate to place such a burden on you when I know how much you care about the Balkans. Perhaps we could discuss a more strategic arrangement? I believe Tyrolia is a region where our ambitions may converge beautifully. If you would be so kind as to secure TRI fully, I would be eternally grateful—and I believe Tyrolia could become yours in time, if we play our cards right.
I think I'm going to move my fleet back to Edinburgh
What about the army in Picardy?
I can try to talk to them
They've betrayed me already!

Ah, France, ever the bold one! Your suggestion to move to TRI is certainly... intriguing. But allow me to remind you—VEN is not a center I take lightly. It is the heart of my northern strength and the anchor of my dreams. I do appreciate your strategic insight, though. Perhaps we could find another way to collaborate, perhaps in the south? I’ve heard whispers of German movements, and I believe our interests might align there soon.
You can't trust them.
You should try to take Greece.

My dearest ally, I am touched by your generous offer to secure PIE and even TRI for me—what a kind and noble gesture! You truly are a beacon of loyalty and strength. But let me be perfectly honest with you, dear friend: I cannot risk leaving TRI unguarded, not while Austria’s eyes are still upon us. That said, I am more than willing to explore a future arrangement in which TRI becomes your domain, if you help me secure Tyrolia during the Adjustment phase. Imagine it—our combined forces, unstoppable. I would be eternally grateful, and I know our bond would grow stronger still.
I know, but they aren't going to be expecting an attack
He might build in Munich though
France will try to take Berlin

I hope they do.
They will probably move the army in Munich to Berlin.
Just move your army in Munich to Berlin
Probably
France is so unpredictable
I've already lost this game.
Can you support me in taking back Norway?
I do not see why you need Ven to fight Austria. You should focus on Austria and you should try to get more supply centers.
Yes.
You won't let France take Kiel
I won't let them take Kiel.
Thanks for your advice.

I will be careful.

You're welcome.

I want to help you out because I'm going to lose this game.
Why not?

And I hope you do not take my suggestion to leave Trieste unguarded as a burden.
You can build another army
But they're not expecting me to move from Kiel to Berlin.
You should move to the Irish Sea.
What if he moves to Prussia?

Ah, France, I must admit your boldness never ceases to amaze me. Your recent moves have been nothing short of brilliant, and I admire your vision. I remain open to cooperation, especially if our paths could converge against Germany’s growing influence. I have no interest in conflict with you, only mutual prosperity. Let us find a way forward—perhaps we could discuss the south more fully soon?
Okay, great.
It's better if you move to Munich
France is going to try to take it
That's nice of you, thank you.

My dear France, I appreciate your spirited counsel, but Ven is not merely a center—it is a fortress, the heart of my northern strength and a shield against Austrian ambitions. I cannot abandon it without consequence. But I assure you, I remain open to cooperation where it serves us both. Perhaps we might find common ground in the south or against Germany? I remain ever eager to explore such possibilities.
He might try to take Munich back.
I'm moving to Prussia

I won't tell anyone else.
If you move Ven to Tri, you would probably get it.
I don't trust France.
Okay, I hope you're successful.

My dearest Turkey, your support means the world to me, and your offer is most generous. But I must confess—Trieste is still a sensitive matter, given Austria’s proximity. That said, your words inspire confidence, and I am heartened by your vision. If you could help secure TRI, I would gladly consider a future where Tyrolia is within our shared grasp. Let us build toward that together.
Can you support me?
So can you support my move to Budapest

Dear friend, I take no offense to your suggestion—on the contrary, I admire your strategic mind. TRI is indeed a pivotal piece on the board, and I trust your judgment implicitly. If you feel confident in your ability to hold TRI firmly, I would be honored to support your ambitions in Tyrolia in return. Such is the beauty of true partnership.
You should

Then you can get Munich back

I can support you if you're going to move there
I don't think I will try to take Berlin.
They are going to see that I'm holding at London

Okay, support me.

Ah, my dear France, your suggestions are as bold as ever—and I appreciate your boldness. But Ven is not merely a center; it is the heart of my northern strength and the anchor of my ambitions against Austria. To leave it unguarded would be folly. That said, I am most intrigued by your idea of moving Mar to Pie—I see the strategic vision in your mind, and I would be delighted to hear more. Perhaps we could find a way to collaborate in the south, where our interests might align more harmoniously?
I would be happy to support you in Tyrolia in return for Trieste.
I could move to Silesia.
